StructurePhase.Reference: Rogers B.A., Atkins D.F., Trans. Am. Inst. Min. Metall. Pet. Eng., v203 p1034 (1955)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: N. LPF Collection Code: 535084. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS:Nb,Zr. Compound Preparation: arc-melted. CRUCIBLE: copper hearth. ATMOSPHERE: argon. Sample annealed at 1373 K, quenched. Article Title: Zirconium-Columbium Diagram. Minor Warning: No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. No R factor reported/abstracted. LPF Editor Comment: editor deduced probable site occupation from nominal composition. Wyckoff Sequence: a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
